name: validate
title: Signature Validator
description: Validate an Ed25519 signature. Takes a public key, signature, and message bytes, and returns true if the signature is valid, false otherwise.

publicKey.description: Hex encoded public key (account key) as hex string, with or without 0x prefix

signature.description: Hex encoded Ed25519 signature (64 bytes, 128 hex characters), with or without 0x prefix

bytes.description: Hex encoded message bytes that were signed, with or without 0x prefix

value.description: true if the signature is valid, false otherwise
